name: Scallop
description: Rows of half-round scallops cresting like roof tiles, the shells fading and re-colouring on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 100%, @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)) 0 47%, transparent 49%) 0 100% / 33.4% 60% repeat-x, var(--color0); opacity: @rand(0.7, 1); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
